name: Blue Moon Group Holdings Limited
summary: Blue Moon Group Holdings Limited researches, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells personal hygiene, home care, and fabric care products in China. The company offers fabric care products, including machine wash laundry, pre-wash treatment, hand wash, strain removers, fabric softeners, and fabric disinfectant products, as well as baby liquid laundry detergents; personal hygiene products comprising liquid soaps; toilet and bathroom cleaners; and general home care products, such as anti-mould cleaners, floor cleaners, bleaches, glass cleaners, multi-surface cleaners, rust cleaners, and disinfectant liquids. It also provides kitchen cleaning products, including utensil, fruit, and vegetable cleaning products, as well as range of hood cleaners. The company offers its products under the Blue Moon, Supreme, Jingxiang, and Tianlu brands. It sells its products through e-commerce platforms, online stores, hypermarkets, supermarkets, and offline distributors. Blue Moon Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China. Blue Moon Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Aswann Ventures Limited.
